query: Tell me about Tajima beef from Hyogo, the origin of Kobe beef.
reasoning: Tool choice (get_local_food) is correct for a food query. However the featured content surfaced — five Japan Heritage stories about folk songs, pottery kilns, sea trade routes, and mythological islands — is entirely unrelated to Tajima beef. With 195 items in the response the beef record may exist but is buried below irrelevant heritage stories (RULE B: ranking failure, single root cause). RULE D applies: lang='en' was specified but all visible body text is Japanese, so constraint_handling drops by 1.
missing_data: Tajima beef (但馬牛) MAFF GI record or local food entry with English description, breed lineage explanation, relationship to Kobe beef certification, key production areas (Tajima region), and where to buy or taste it in Hyogo.
improvement_hint: Boost beef-category records (wagyu, 牛, 但馬牛, 神戸牛) to the top of get_local_food results when the query contains beef-related keywords; ensure lang filter applies to featured_japan_heritage_food_stories body excerpts or suppress non-food-matching heritage stories from the featured block.
